task: Maintenance WO lifecycle mutations emit spine events via emitMaintenanceSpineEvent helper calling events.log_event(). Covers: wo.created, wo.completed, wo.status_changed, wo.line_item_added, wo.line_item_removed.
details: New helper: maintenance-spine-emit.ts — wraps events.log_event() for all maintenance event types.

work-orders.routes.ts: wo.created (POST /work-orders), wo.completed (PATCH /complete), wo.status_changed (PATCH /transition + POST /status), wo.line_item_added (POST /line-items), wo.line_item_removed (DELETE /line-items/:lid).
